name: Spec-Task System
description: Structured task management with lifecycle enforcement. Provides 11 tools (config_merge, task_recall, task_create, task_transition, task_log, task_verify, task_resume, task_archive, task_instructions, steps_read, steps_update) and hooks (before_prompt_build, before_tool_call) for sub-agent compliance and step tracking.

enforceOnSubAgents.description: Whether to inject spec-task reminders for sub-agents (default: true)
